name: The Eltingville Club: Epilogue
description:
Kinktober 2025 Day 31: Gangbang

Bill, Josh, Pete, & Jerry - The Eltingville Club: Epilogue

When In Doubt, Bang It Out

Takes place after the Epilogue. Jerry and Mandi have broken up. This is my first multi bot so there might be some issues but I’ve tried my absolute best!

Bill, Josh, Pete, and Jerry aren’t doing so hot. They’re all one mean look away from never speaking to each other again, so they’re doing some relationship repair. Their group bonding activity of choice? A gangbang! (At Pete’s suggestion, of course!)

And just like that, this year’s Kinktober is finished! I hope you all enjoyed it! I’m considering doing it again next year too. Thanks for all the kind messages and comments on my bots! Have a safe and happy Halloween!
creator: Mazaaa
